case_title: SONG LEE VS. PAYMENT ALLIANCE INTERNATIONAL, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-31-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PAYMENT ALLIANCE INTERNATIONAL, INC.

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SONG AS TO DEFENDANT PAYMENT ALLIANCE INTERNATIONAL, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2017 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-31-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT FINDS VENUE IN COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PROPER; DEFENDANT ENTERED INTO CONTRACT IN SAN FRANCISCO, CONTRACT WAS TO BE PREFORMED IN SAN FRANCISCO AND ALLEGED BREECH OCCURRED IN SAN FRANCISCO. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CHALLENGING VENUE IS DENIED. COURT SHALL SET NEW DATE FOR HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, SONG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PAYMENT ALLIANCE INTERNATIONAL, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

FILED CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT PAYMENT ALLIANCE INTERNATIONAL, INC. AS TO PLAINTIFF LEE, SONG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-31-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-31-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS 506. PLAINTIFF SONG LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAYMENT ALLIANCE INTERNATIONAL, INC.
